Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi to Jebel Jais Bus Timings, Routes, and Travel Guide

May 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Below is a comprehensive guide to help you plan your route, save money, and make the most of your journey.

1. Bus Route via Abu Dhabi Central Station (Best Overall)

A well-balanced option between cost and travel time, this route combines buses and metro services for a seamless journey.

  • Estimated Travel Time: 6 hours 14 minutes

  • Cost: AED 783 AED 1,075

Journey Overview:

Step 1: Start at Abu Dhabi, Central Bus Station 2 hours 5 minutes, AED 110 AED 160, Bus: E100 (Every 30 minutes), Stop: Max Metro Bus Stop, Al Karama, Dubai.

Step 2: Transfer to Max Metro Station, Al Karama 19 minutes, AED 21 AED 29, Metro Line: MRed (Every 10 minutes), Stop: Airport Terminal 3 Metro Station, Dubai.

Step 3: Bus from Terminal 3 1 hour 3 minutes, AED 150 AED 240, Bus: T1/T3 (Every 4 hours), Stop: Hilton Garden Inn, Ras Al Khaimah.

Step 4: Taxi from Hilton Garden Inn to Jebel Jais 1 hour 45 minutes, AED 500 AED 650, Stop: Jebel Jais, Ras Al Khaimah.

2. Bus via Sharjah

  • Estimated Travel Time: 6 hours 24 minutes

  • Cost: AED 853 AED 1,068

Journey Overview:

Step 1: Start at Abu Dhabi, Central Bus Station 2 hours 45 minutes, AED 130 AED 150, Bus: 117 (Every hour), Stop: Al Jubail Bus Terminal, Sharjah.

Step 2: Transfer to Al Musallah Bus Station 15 minutes, AED 38, Bus: Sh1 (Every 20 minutes).

Step 3: Bus to Ras Al Khaimah 50 minutes, AED 85 AED 130, Bus: Ajman to Al Hamra Bus Station, Ras Al Khaimah.

Step 4: Taxi to Jebel Jais 1 hour 51 minutes, AED 600 AED 750, Stop: Jebel Jais, Ras Al Khaimah.

3. Bus via Abu Dhabi - Men’s College

  • Estimated Travel Time: 6 hours 41 minutes

  • Cost: AED 783 AED 1,082

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Journey Overview:

Step 1: Start at Abu Dhabi - Men’s College 8 minutes, AED 2 AED 3, Bus: X5, 034, 055, 405 (Every 10 minutes), Stop: Abu Dhabi Bus Station.

Step 2: Transfer to Abu Dhabi, Central Bus Station 2 hours 5 minutes, AED 110 AED 160, Bus: E100 (Every 30 minutes), Stop: Max Metro Bus Stop, Al Karama, Dubai.

Step 3: Transfer to Max Metro Station, Al Karama 19 minutes, AED 21 AED 29, Metro Line: MRed (Every 10 minutes), Stop: Airport Terminal 3 Metro Station, Dubai.

Step 4: Bus from Terminal 3 1 hour 5 minutes, AED 150 AED 240, Bus: T1/T3 (Every 4 hours), Stop: Hilton Ras Al Khaimah Resort & Spa.

Step 5: Taxi from Hilton Ras Al Khaimah Resort & Spa to Jebel Jais 1 hour 47 minutes, AED 500 AED 650, Stop: Jebel Jais, Ras Al Khaimah.

4. Bus via Hilton Ras Al Khaimah Resort & Spa

  • Estimated Travel Time: 6 hours 52 minutes

  • Cost: AED 793 AED 1,088

Journey Overview:

Step 1: Start at Abu Dhabi, Central Bus Station 2 hours 5 minutes, AED 110 AED 160, Bus: E100 (Every 30 minutes), Stop: Max Metro Bus Stop, Al Karama, Dubai.

Step 2: Transfer to Max Metro Bus Stop Seaside, Al Karama 13 minutes, AED 14 AED 21, Bus: 32C, F27, C26 (Every 10 minutes), Stop: Satwa Bus Station 3.

Step 3: Transfer to Satwa Bus Station 3 29 minutes, AED 17 AED 21, Bus: 32C (Every 20 minutes), Stop: Airport Terminal Bus Station, Dubai Festival City.

Step 4: Bus from Terminal 3 1 hour 5 minutes, AED 150 AED 240, Bus: T1/T3 (Every 4 hours), Stop: Hilton Ras Al Khaimah Resort & Spa.

Step 5: Taxi from Hilton Ras Al Khaimah Resort & Spa to Jebel Jais 1 hour 47 minutes, AED 500 AED 650, Stop: Jebel Jais, Ras Al Khaimah.

Travel Tips for Jebel Jais

  • Best Time to Visit: The cooler months (October to April) offer the best weather for outdoor activities at Jebel Jais.

  • Activities: Don’t miss the world’s longest zip line, mountain climbing, or simply enjoying the stunning views.
  • Packing Tips: Be sure to bring comfortable clothing, sunscreen, and plenty of water for your hike or adventure.

The winding roads up the mountain offer breathtaking views, making the trip as memorable as the destination itself. So, sit back, relax, and enjoy the adventure that awaits!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 10, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
